title: More Better Wood
description: Dont like the already good wood? Well this will definetly convince you
body:
**Created so that wood wont look boring! All Wood planks, logs etc. Are now enhanced and provide a more modern feel. This is in beta so please provide feedback at... [PyroGames](https://discord.gg/eyCqWpQcA2). You may ask where is the bedrock verzion? More Better Wood is coming to bedrock very soon! So thank you all who support me and hope you enjoy!**

### A Picture of stripped acacia wood
![A picture of stripped acacia wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3fbe277d57f29ef132de4432add9180129725bd.png)
